title: Reject unsupported signed-encrypted link frames
description: Align Python/Rust/C and the draft on signed+encrypted link behavior. Since Python/Rust do not implement encrypted link payloads, reject S=1,E=1 frames consistently rather than allowing C to emit frames with mismatched signature coverage. Document the unsupported status and add parser/TX tests.
close_reason: Implemented and verified signed+encrypted rejection across Python/Rust/C, updated draft and vectors, and added focused parser/TX tests.
